nodes.label: Trinity as single source of truth
nodes.rationale: Trinity is the only persistence surface so published Revisions/Samples/Flagged Compounds remain immutable evidence; no loose report folders or SQLite calls outside Trinity to prevent silent data corruption or untracked writes.
